title: Audit Question
description: One question in the interactive audit. Questions are non-sensitive by construction: no field may request seeds, keys, addresses, exact balances, passwords, PINs, or government ID numbers.

help_text.description: Plain-language clarification shown under the prompt.

flags.description: Classification flags this option contributes, e.g. 'custody.concentration', 'estate.authority_access_mismatch'.

applies_when.description: Conditional display. Question shown only if the referenced earlier answers match.

privacy_note.description: If present, reminds the user not to enter sensitive data here.

maps_to_flags.description: Flags this question can set regardless of option (e.g. completion markers).
